name: Next Day Broccoli and Scrambled Eggs
recipeIngredient: reheat in microwave or double boiler
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the toast at the bottom of a deep bowl.
2. Reheat the broccoli in the microwave or using a double boiler.
3. Heat the butter in a skillet until it becomes golden.
4. Scramble the eggs and cook them until they are almost fully scrambled, but not quite cooked.
5. Remove the eggs from the heat and continue to stir. Cook the remaining eggs over low heat until they are fully set.
6. Season with salt and Tabasco sauce to taste.
